title: Quevedo
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my "home" metro station while I stayed in Madrid. It's well-located, easy to find, and surprisingly clean compared to many metro stations I've had the pleasure of using around the world. It's well-lit at night, open late, and the stairs are not to steep for my wife. Bonus! Honestly my favorite way for commuting around Madrid. Keep in mind there are no elevators or escalators going down, only stairs.

There's a lot of card options, but I think the best choice is the 10-trip card. It's good for buses and metro. I'd scan through the turnstile and then had the card to my wife and she'd do the same.

2-trips used. Simple.

Leaving the metro is even easier as you DON'T SCAN to leave. Just...leave! Be careful of the platform as there are no rails to keep you from falling off the tracks. Just stay on your side of the yellow line. When the train arrives, push the glowing button on the metro car to open the door.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtuZztiAE&fid=0x0:0x28873dc15ecbd999"],"When":"2024-2-5"},{"Name":"tuyen nq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaaWKWiLPWApiW6pFNFszQFEk4ZU9ujo3S6VIBGpvGi2naEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Convenient","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J. Carlos Casía Esora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWi_J7RD9eoyIk4MCuX0BlzdJkosNgilEla9bDUKcWNUkVgk_U_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Plaza céntrica con muchos restaurantes alrededor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQl4XhVw&fid=0x0:0x28873dc15ecbd999"],"When":"2025-3-7"},{"Name":"José Julio Melgares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPlI3_WxZ-JbiFDSG6A1n_aKR_BFRpvuYb0hLgejNuccGQun5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Con dos salidas en la Glorieta de Quevedo, una entre la calle Fuencarral y la Calle San Bernardo y la otra en la calle Arapiles. Es decir, esta estación como muchas otra están impracticables y me siento discriminada, aunque tenga que pagar el billete como el resto, no puedo usar muchas paradas. Un 0 en esto. Ojalá cambien las cosas pronto. Un saludo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"leonard aboussa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8xOf8FGcJ8BSfWjwog0ftR4YvYvVAAEsS2MEW1SmXGdEQhxE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tranquilo. Zona muy comercial (comercios y hosteleria)
Zona de libre coches los domingos....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICmtaDf6QE&fid=0x0:0x28873dc15ecbd999"],"When":"2022-1-4"}]

title: Ramón y Cajal
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Manuel A Rivas S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe1VzHd2jwYWI4kGZBHZlPfRWxPUZ7ASJ8Y84wzN7Qngn7vzbV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estación de tren con solera de la buena. Está ubicada de forma exquisita  para el acceso al hospital Ramon y Cajal, hago un inciso aquí para, siendo madrileño y viviendo en Mallorca, reconocer que los medios de transporte en Madrid son de primer orden. Volviendo a la reseña, es verdad que a la estación se le ve algo viejita, pero es funcional. Tiene un par de cafeterías que también sirven comida y máquinas de expeciviin de billetes tanto de cercanías como de Renfe media y larga distancia, aseos y demás servicios necesarios para el funcionamiento. Veo en las reseñas que hay mucha gente que marca muy poca puntuación por la estética, pero también es verdad que la estación está bastante vandalizada y que parece que si no está reformada no merece una alta valoración, cuando la verdad es que si viajas por europa hay capitales con trenes y estaciones del año del catapum, pero mantiene su eficiencia que es lo importante. Por lo que le otorgó 4 estrellas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhtd_CygE&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2023-3-14"},{"Name":"F FTG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5whkxL309ThExH3SJwarcpiyXkU5BdE5VCFmOUeSB8XEmaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Sábado 24 de Enero 11:30 am
El encargado de la estación ha sido muy amable y servicial con todos los usuarios.
Enormemente agradecido.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anonymous","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUE7Ulf2zrSTZ-J5qxNh6h1m4tgPUGuyXMtV9rlEiHWZHQjF4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estación de las líneas C7 y C8 de Cercanías (a 2025) algo descuidada y complicada en cuanto a accesibilidad, con un desnivel en el andén. Cuenta con cafeterías en el vestíbulo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyozrFcGVZlHu90D--vgAY&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Ma Ca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdX3tAK1ZJlSEdh8h8NGSBOAWGhVcUa-CtxrL2cSRL-XqgIQzj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La estación es bastante antigua. Está justo la salida enfrente al hospital Ramón y Cajal. Las vías están al aire libre. No tienen escaleras mecánicas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkgZjVlQE&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2018-7-30"},{"Name":"Jimena Pardo Mnuel de Villena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLNDkdm7vAhdN_5OmMjODUEAfKAJZTxO44BRnLFG1T5sE0NyOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Es bastante penoso el servicio que ofrece esta parada, los trenes pasan cada mil años aunque esta parada sea la de un hospital muy relevante en la ciudad. Deberían mejorar los servicios de cercanías para mejorar la conexión.
Siempre que he ido la parada esta bastante destartalada y nunca he encontrado ni un guardia de seguridad, es una verdadera vergüenza de parada en comparación a cualquier otra que haya visitado","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOhs7qHQ&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2022-6-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Majada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUk5ilP53oRttTXM8j07WJyM21foeMrmGF2cZ824mG2OLcKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Como una imagen vale más que mil palabras adjunto unas cuantas del estado lamentable de la estación.

Tablones astillados y sueltos (al caminar se levantan), tornillos sacados y oxidados.

Es un peligro que el suelo no esté nivelado, no me quiero ni imaginar lo que pasaría si alguien se tropieza cerca de las vías.

Una vergüenza.

Adjunto fotos de todo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDexPD8zQE&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2022-10-2"},{"Name":"Conchi C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYgOyahdI90cM1JgZClOlmbPOJ6pah2fRfgDQF8phNpZ1c1bhP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Buena cobertura con el hospital Ramón y Cajal y horrible para personas con baja visión como es mi caso, tarima mal puesta, escalones por todas partes, sin embargo un buen hall, una reforma para hacerla un poco accesible no estaría mal, inviable sillas de ruedas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Belice Belice","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOxl7Rkn2I0xAGb9I2PiBHoLmJZT7xJCvprrO-LmacFREsUgGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estación de tren Ramon y Cajal te deja en la puerta del hospital. Buena comunicación con Chamartín y Atocha. Hay cafeterías y kiosko de prensa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2r5qCXg&fid=0x0:0x921ab252165526f"],"When":"2022-5-1"}]

title: Recoletos
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gregor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCAtFtXlq6IlQWcV1Roye88loYw7YBhjN_XysqaE50bVt0qbc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible station although they are in the process of modernising it. If you have baggage or kids or if you are an elderly person avoid this station.
Another problem is that the station is basically always packed at the time when people go to work or come from work. There are just not enough trains. And the trains are always later because always something happens. The rail network in general seems to be in a very poor condition.

Update July 2024: one year later and finally they installed elevators. However they still cannot be used. This station is a never-ending construction yard. I am thinking about looking for an alternative as Renfe Cercanías is not an option for urban mobility.

Update January 2025:
Still looks horrible. Elevators are working by now at least. But when I have a look at photos from 2019 I cannot really see any difference. The paint on walls and the floor is new, and they removed some benches where people could sit, now there are less available. But the screens in the main hall still do not work regularly. Sometimes there is no information at all, nothing in the screen, nothing via speaker. But the problem is not just this station, Renfe Cercanías in general is a huge construction yard and they have so many things to solve that I guess even they don’t know where to start

Update Oct 2025: nothing is being improved here. The station remains in its terrible state. I noticed it got more dirty during the past months. There is water leaking from who knows where onto the floor in many areas. Very high humidity inside which can make you sweat, even though the weather outside is perfect.

Update December 2025: there are elevators now, at least people with limitations are able to access it, going directly to the platform.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_qquRWQ&fid=0x0:0xa6a74753ac321a15"],"When":"2025-1-23"},{"Name":"Jan Stuhler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8kxYtdBsQ8jOnD0owv5bGOPEDhgZ0i2Ui6rT5WqLbJYL1RoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The cercanías trains coming from the north often change direction in Chamartín -- without updating the schedule and without telling people in the train. The system has become unusable and  I will switch to using the car.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter Zhou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVURrua0vc3cHqmoS65slsnpouhzyXJi8-gCpz-Be822TD04iuE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"WARNING: DO NOT use this station if you have a lot of baggage. There are no elevator and only a part of the stairs is escalator. I took a train from the airport to here and figured I had to walk up the stair with my two suitcases...not fun...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ay Gee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWmaqcz4GBV8m2AKapIQOL6SK8Wnm8k1qrKoERfER5f1IyMTSp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"There is no elevator and only 1/4 sets of stairs is an escalator. Beware, people with reduced mobility—this station is a nightmare.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicolas Van Tomme","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQDPUcZ6-R2TgpvSkvwSUrpDlFI154LAuiciMVv7lvTn5GZ5Ap6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just wanted to do a little review about the metro, bus and train system here in Madrid, it is so well designed and works so well that it is one of the best I have seen in any City I have been.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vasu Nagalingam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJCSremh-9mPD7wl4de76rn2ETDZ0GAYK2d3RCN7QZSJ2tME5O-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"You can take a train to here directly from the Madrid airport. Then just walk down the street (south) to Plaza de Cibeles and then a left to the park.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Balazs Kadar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqf3Xj836pFYTP5oLtuQGlaRHn1XxaHgDVW7o5Z9b7_vDx_yWP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Big train, metro station, easy found the way.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Urban Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZY0HoHOb7lzycQDWjKey0rY0ABGKAZdibLczqX3_UWre4TRE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Nothing fancy nor sophisticated metropolitan railway station","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE88ybMw&fid=0x0:0xa6a74753ac321a15"],"When":"2018-2-6"}]

title: Madrid Chamartín-Clara Campoamor
address: C. de Agustín de Foxá, Chamartín, 28036 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dan R. Deneyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYtl8rO9TcBn-vonpNx68xIpX46vsOJ2mw93krtHfJpl4Nm4rm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"After reading the horror stories, I arrived at Chamartín fully expecting a post-apocalyptic wasteland while boarding my Madrid–Valencia high-speed train. Reality turned out to be far less dramatic.

Yes, the station is under construction and messy, but it’s not nearly as vast or confusing as some reviews suggest. The real issues are the lack of seating and the cold - January is not the month to linger. That said, contrary to popular legend, there are clean toilets (€1) on the commuter trains side, and more once you pass high-speed security.

If travelling by high-speed train, arriving about an hour early is sensible due to checks, but not any earlier, due to lack of seats. Platforms (16–25) are announced at least 15 minutes before departure - ours was announced even earlier - so boarding is straightforward, with no need for Olympic-level sprinting.

In short: chaotic, under construction, and uncomfortably short on seats, but perfectly navigable, better organised than expected, and blessed with toilets. Panic unnecessary.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAu-LApdlNwISnxRMXyo0ok&fid=0x0:0x29eb160572bb9256"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"David","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbuXSRzHKjXjy_APwmCHCEjE2xsSOFCrN1ELPTt1IdHPP9rbOl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We arrived 15 minutes before our departure time to a chaotic station full of people and no way of knowing what line to get on. Everyone we interacted with was rude. The Renfe app only said boarding stops 2 minutes prior to departure, so we thought 15 minutes was early enough. In the end we got to the train and they wouldn’t let us board. We had to search for the Renfe office that offered no assistance other than to buy new tickets that were more expensive than the previous ones. Again, everyone was super rude. Now we were too early for the next train so they wouldn’t let us in. All the seats were taken, but there were many seats available in a room for people with disabilities. I have a bad knee, so we argued with the man at the door until he let us in to sit down. 2 minutes later, the staff inside kicked us out. There was only 1 other person there with 15 empty seats. The people here just don’t care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Giovanni Brussi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbsU0VohP3BLPFjnJbtot55fV-6pm9k8KQhfcmJ78qXvmO58ct0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The station is a chaotic and confusing place, and it feels like I'm walking through a constant construction site.
It's difficult for tourists to find their way around; it was a confusing experience trying to figure out how to get from one platform to another.
It's a very important hub in Madrid and you can easily get there by metro or bus but the train ticket machines for Renfe were surprisingly complicated to use.
It definitely wasn't a smooth process.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCPzIkzN89wtzVCMnB9vOZ&fid=0x0:0x29eb160572bb9256"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Radiate Repeat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgPsquCroPs-88gB-oVwRvhHRocZG8U1yb6j5jgapPeg8fqLyC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a large train station and can be a bit disorientating, so a top tip would be to allow yourself a lot of time 🕰️ to navigate it and find where you need to be.

The metro arrives on a lower level and it can feel tricky to find which floor the train platforms are.

The staff are helpful and there is security to go through, so allow time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKfC-Lbvgd2GWA&fid=0x0:0x29eb160572bb9256"],"When":"2025-5-9"},{"Name":"TTT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBB_tKh8KSVONAQMzVuT6wy7lh2m6dWv4DQ8YYkE1OrBpJGiy1kQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Station is under renovation so directional signs  are minimal. We didn’t know where to wait for our Uber so we blindly followed the crowd. Thankfully we didn’t have to walk very far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3A7sOy7tCQJQV5iRKfFNP&fid=0x0:0x29eb160572bb9256"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Alexandro Lastra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgyuHcswZKx1OaNHTJALJNLWsBogCNx0maRHrrgVfvja9E0TuO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The train station is underconstruction.  Not appropriate surface to roll suitcase. It would take you longer than calculated on Google maps to arrive from metro or local urban trains Cercanías. No water fontains for a city that has dangerous high levels of temperatures on summer. Paying toilets that are not worthy clean to what you pay. Expensive pricing as expected. But no working coffee machines. I recommend you if you use Ouigo to wait to use the cafeteria train. Prices are more affordable and you get fair enough variety and more comfortable than on the train station. I'll give the price menu  on Ouigo Cafétéria to compare your self. Ouigo people even bring it to your seat. They close the bar and cafeteria 10 minutes before arrival.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtSAqaWLwjyhIakgEWEC3f&fid=0x0:0x29eb160572bb9256"],"When":"2025-6-19"},{"Name":"Trevor Perry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuStlv2nAE6XYtypANWf5poKfZEDBbwOEKNXSlBMvpAnGJsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Pretty poor.  Signage is terrible and misleading. They don't let you through the barriers until shortly before the train departs and then the queueing system descends into havoc.  Bit of a nightmare to find your way around the place.  We used both Renfe and Ouigo AVE trains.  Ouigo are cheaper but Renfe is worth the extra unless the price difference is enormous.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamy Dinkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGIRWTGdUhH39C2an4HAN3W5_deMNVkc_kK1f7Eb2KG96AehCE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst train station in Madrid—during the construction there is almost no food available, there is wildly insufficient seating, and the Renfe Sala Club is closed. This means that passengers transferring here are unable to access basic services, clean restrooms, or seats for passengers with mobility disabilities. A truly spectacular miss when the rest if Madrid’s transit is quite good.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Cercanias station Recoletos
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ruben GP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKiAegZfQLMuBdiUWvM4VL5_PHt_TM9S6GzcKfzff5v4cb6A9p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A superb station, very clean, easy to understand all signs, and really well maintained and organised. Besides, the personnel are very friendly","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clive Butcher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIfwvrCLMhdGaPB0iHlkvU_DAU8WvpPBmSh00YD7qBQxPkPbFn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No elevators. Escalators only to level -1. Por lo demás,una estación de tren bien situada y relativamente cerca de la Plaza de Cibeles","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChr9bjFg&fid=0x0:0x2f842727b52bc24b"],"When":"2023-2-25"},{"Name":"Javier Miranda Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_iOuNH7M_8G_Aa9UCwnxEooEabfEplDAZiJdbD5CLEKshmD3p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pese a ser una estación de Cercanías en una zona tan bonita de Madrid, es una pena que se encuentra descuidada. Obra que parecen no terminar nunca, el dolor de cabeza de lo que tarda el Cercanías, a veces los tornos no leen el abono, etc...
Le pongo tres estrellas por la edificación pero el servicio deja que desear.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICNsZ-kywE&fid=0x0:0x2f842727b52bc24b"],"When":"2024-1-15"},{"Name":"maria del carmen Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWONNXqf2GAYH9gldWbQs6Q0RNgpwhd6vEs3evLB10FLlWJL7q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"volví porque la.comida de 10 no tengo quejas de nada atención. La.mejor calidad y precio excelente todo felicidades 👏 👏","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guillermo Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVywR0g7y0Cy3dBPGFLCoiuHLAXWlQzObEJXYSDv5-NKI_788=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen servicio el que ofrece Cercanías RENFE, empresa pública con buenos equipamientos, buena atención al público y buen ratio de puntualidad. La mejor opción para recorrer la castellana rápido.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR8fmmKA&fid=0x0:0x2f842727b52bc24b"],"When":"2023-4-4"},{"Name":"José Antonio Franco López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJSJjGbc5wkmIvKuQctOFAhWMxfAsLXVgzc5-Oymoc0_fejHpC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La Estación de Recoletos es una parada subterránea de la red de Cercanías Madrid, situada en el Paseo de Recoletos, entre la Plaza de Colón y la Plaza de Cibeles, junto a la Biblioteca Nacional.  Inaugurada en 1967, forma parte del túnel que conecta las estaciones de Atocha y Nuevos Ministerios, y da servicio a las líneas C-2, C-7, C-8 y C-10  .

Esta estación destaca por su ubicación céntrica, siendo una de las pocas de la red que no cuenta con correspondencia directa con el metro.  Las paradas más cercanas son Colón (Línea 4) a unos 200 metros y Banco de España (Línea 2) a aproximadamente 500 metros.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Izzat ZA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1UqtIPpGsehwDzjHlLCj5eTBuzVBvaSvDhhDvtD5YN_fAkos=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Most train stations are stressful places you want to escape as fast as possible, but Atocha is the only one where you might actually want to hang around. I was catching the high-speed train down to Seville, and honestly, waiting here feels less like a transit hub and more like waiting in a greenhouse.

The 'old' terminal is the main highlight—it is basically a massive tropical jungle inside a 19th-century steel building. Walking in and seeing hundreds of palm trees under that huge industrial roof is a total flex. It is a surreal vibe that makes for a great photo op while you kill time before boarding.

However, a practical warning for first-timers: this place is a maze. The station is split into different levels and zones, and the signage for the Iryo (high-speed) departures isn't always the most intuitive. It took me a minute to figure out exactly where I needed to be, so definitely don't cut it close. Give yourself an extra 15 minutes just to navigate the layout so you aren't sprinting past the plants to catch your ride.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVx9VP6BX0nhnc-fM6CXKe&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Zoe Harle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhoaw0I4sNP3QuQECFhyygPTI0wSV1QqQk1i5JJ4vI5Zhb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What a mess!

Although half of Madrid seems to be under some sort of redevelopment covered in square kilometres of plastic sheeting, the redevelopment of Atocha station is currently a disgrace to the Spanish capital.

Have ETA reformed, the misguided Islamic jahidis succeeded or has the Princess of Asturias been practising airborne precision bombing?

For Atchoa has two craters (one indoors, one outdoors) with so much noise, dust, pandemonium and suffering.

Bodies lie along the cold, dusty floor as there is nowhere to sit.

If you can't take it any more, the electricians have provided handy nooses (see photo).

Staff are grumpy, facilities are limited and passengers are treated like cattle. Fights break out between normally respectable people when one of the very, very limited number of seats becomes available.

Why Skoda felt their advertising should adorn nearly every piece of hoarding in this emporium to drilling of concrete just makes my head explode.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUVVHMpwnTtdr48-LiH5HL&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Heather Ace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFJpiT2RcPTj6xVxNlEJKu9M9YCdz83RLqxc3Mwdx60515jLs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We never did find the beautiful part in the photos lol. We came here on a train from Barcelona and it was a bit confusing to get around. That may be because of all of the construction. To find the Uber pick up spot meant that we left the main station crossed over Multiple lines of traffic to a crazy long Taxi line, went downstairs and wove ourway to the very hidden Uber spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBiCIkNk0PSXw4bew9jDx52&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Ahmed Alhussami","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9eytievT88-lWWbeRx1ctp06J80oBsKzV5B0AoIsvPlKkiMqe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Madrid Atocha is a huge station, but it’s starting to show its age. The interior feels dull and outdated, and it could really use some remodeling and refurbishment. It definitely serves its purpose well, but as the largest train station in Spain, it deserves to stand out more. Whenever I travel from/to this station, I alaways pay attention to the signs because to me it's like a maze.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUF7PFa48zuur6g_ufQw3U&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Sergiu Florea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDVjRcPAaP3Ko364P-7MhncOvESonlTXSf6sIoKuMfBntpUKb1og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The first time in my life when I saw a cosmetics shop named body shop, it was closed. They got 300km/h speed trains and a botanical garden inside the station, because outside it will probably dry out. Very beautiful station and platypus looking trains.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzWT3ETP3Oo5NXI6oPmgwJ&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2025-8-5"},{"Name":"Trey Saunders","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFcQUNLSblQBVjwvSefXZ1PJg8s1vQuBsKv0juVJaUeb4yNA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is the main station of Madrid where long distance trains depart from. There is security screening to enter the train platforms. The platform areas can get quite busy and sometimes the platform announcements are delayed and it can lead to a lot of people pushing through to get to a single platform gate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7CRgrHNOShfqOujBpfBHW&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Asa Sherwyn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlS7z7tQ6zDWksxswM4eEHgihmZThJqU1yc4xPPQMuFGza8W5C=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I love train stations and airports in general, unfortunately Madrid Pierre de Atocha does not have much to offer. There are virtually no seats for people waiting for trains, half of the station is in a state of noticeable disrepair, the other half is under construction. It seems like this station was once a grand place to be, but as the decades have progressed the city has put the bare minimum into maintaining it. The only thing they seem to maintain is the advertising which obnoxiously obstructs almost all of the architectural beauty of the station.

I made the mistake of planning my journey song could have plenty of time to explore the station. If you pass through here, I suggest you spend as little time as possible.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwm7b-Fg&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Radiate Repeat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgPsquCroPs-88gB-oVwRvhHRocZG8U1yb6j5jgapPeg8fqLyC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fairly easy to navigate but it is quite big, so allow time to find your platform and get through security.

There are lots of buses and taxis outside.
The security is quick and then you get to a big holding space where you’ll wait for your train. There are plenty of boards to see the trains and platforms.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELTukJ7bobXoRQ&fid=0x0:0x3947f9c28d65035b"],"When":"2025-5-9"}]

title: Estación de Madrid-Chamartín-Clara Campoamor
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estacion de Chamartin is the "second" station of Madrid after Atocha. It's located well off the tourist circuit, but is the station used for Segovia and the international trains such as to Lisbon. I've used the station for both. The facilities are not on par with Atocha, but then it's not as import either. Regardless, there's plenty of useful shops while waiting for the train. The station is fairly easy to navigate, and information for departures as about as straight-forward as can be with both English and Spanish used for the information boards.

The last tie I used the station was for the sleep train to Lisbon. No problem getting on board and finding my berth. I've used sleeper trains, but can't remember the last time that I've had one quite as bumpy as this one. I kept being woken up every time the train braked.

The station is bright, modern and useful, so can't ask for any more than that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcgpDe-AE&fid=0x0:0x371c6af06d627cea"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"julie demdam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU91YZc2gBzRVDSGV7oB8mrrta5ct-x15qsWBAMAeFWemgfia7e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is the local station that gets you to destinations within the country. Within close proximity.

This is how I went from Madrid to Santiago de Compostela.
It’s a fairly small station with lots of construction currently happening so give yourself some time in case you need to go from one end to another.

My hotel was located close enough so I walked over after checking out. I had more than enough time so I was able to have a proper meal while I waited for my gate number to be announced.
I went through security as soon as my gate was announced then they let us board.

title: Metro San Bernardo
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Guillermo Musica _","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC5DOVNWgZbIQ3sAPD-Dwe_fv5J4NQgRH5ODqvRP78T-UdJ2Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"### Reseña: Estación de Metro San Bernardo

#### Ubicación y Contexto
- **Localización:** La estación de Metro San Bernardo se encuentra en el barrio de Universidad, dentro del distrito Centro de Madrid, España. Está situada en la intersección de las calles San Bernardo y Alberto Aguilera.
- **Líneas:** Es una estación de intersección para las líneas 2 y 4 del Metro de Madrid.

#### Historia y Desarrollo
- **Inauguración:** La estación fue inaugurada el 21 de octubre de 1925 como parte de la línea 2 del Metro de Madrid. Posteriormente, la línea 4 se añadió en 1944, convirtiendo a San Bernardo en una estación de correspondencia.
- **Nombre:** La estación lleva el nombre de la calle San Bernardo, que a su vez honra a San Bernardo de Claraval, un monje cisterciense y santo católico del siglo XII.

#### Infraestructura y Servicios
- **Accesos:** La estación cuenta con varios accesos desde las calles San Bernardo y Alberto Aguilera, así como con ascensores y escaleras mecánicas para facilitar el acceso a personas con movilidad reducida.
- **Instalaciones:** Dispone de servicios como máquinas expendedoras de billetes, taquillas, y paneles informativos electrónicos. También ofrece zonas de descanso y áreas comerciales en su interior.
- **Seguridad:** La estación está equipada con cámaras de vigilancia y dispone de personal de seguridad para garantizar la seguridad de los pasajeros.

#### Conexiones y Transporte
- **Líneas de Metro:**
- **Línea 2:** Conecta San Bernardo con Las Rosas y Cuatro Caminos, pasando por estaciones céntricas como Sol y Opera.
- **Línea 4:** Se extiende desde Argüelles hasta Pinar de Chamartín, ofreciendo conexiones clave como Alonso Martínez y Goya.
- **Autobuses:** Varias líneas de autobuses de la EMT Madrid tienen paradas en las cercanías, ofreciendo conexiones adicionales a otras partes de la ciudad.
- **Cercanías:** Aunque no hay una conexión directa con el servicio de Cercanías, la estación está relativamente cerca de otros nodos de transporte que ofrecen acceso a trenes de cercanías y larga distancia.

#### Importancia y Uso
- **Flujo de Pasajeros:** San Bernardo es una estación de alto tráfico, especialmente debido a su ubicación céntrica y su proximidad a áreas comerciales, educativas y residenciales.
- **Puntos de Interés:** La estación está cerca de varios puntos de interés, incluyendo la Universidad Pontificia Comillas, el Tribunal Constitucional, y numerosas tiendas, restaurantes y bares en la zona de Malasaña.

#### Opiniones y Experiencias de los Usuarios
- **Accesibilidad:** Los usuarios valoran positivamente la accesibilidad de la estación, con ascensores y escaleras mecánicas que facilitan el movimiento de personas con movilidad reducida.
- **Conectividad:** La intersección de las líneas 2 y 4 permite a los pasajeros moverse fácilmente por la ciudad, facilitando conexiones rápidas a diversos puntos de Madrid.
- **Mantenimiento:** La estación es generalmente percibida como limpia y bien mantenida, con un ambiente seguro y cómodo para los pasajeros.

En resumen, la estación de Metro San Bernardo es una pieza clave en la red de transporte de Madrid, ofreciendo excelentes conexiones y una variedad de servicios que satisfacen las necesidades de los pasajeros. Su ubicación estratégica en el centro de la ciudad y la integración de múltiples líneas de metro la convierten en un punto de referencia para los desplazamientos en la capital española.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ANTONIO ORELLANA MARTIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFQHw8S2Li-CCHneDhCmHG2K3CyTylyMo1AuOWiB6VaZ-R2K9NSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estación de metro de la linea 2 con conexión con la linea 4 del metro de Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oo Oo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_yrrjfnB_AQ5-SiOAyLwHZdaz0J-xXL-avpZ9A4LGCSDqFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"EmiL tm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItk9CPsDrx8Lo_4V8GjGR_pEjIbeoZG36LAQM6uXjnemtrPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"alvaro garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUb6TChm1Nr3J3HL7JwH6qQbzS8C0QjG8HBw7kmL5mUypzzZfm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lidia (Lidia)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHLlwg07RX5jmTz7X4Lx5Y50SgTxaCBzLRvCsh_Dt2g0dbgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MIGUEL ANGEL ROMERO ARROYO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuU1ZMCahEXT7vf1-Nd5l6FgbL49vylZmI16G9PLujrJrHAw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

Pero claro mantenemos en esos puestos a gente antigua y amargada con su trabajo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roberto Reviriego","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUXwer_F5MnssX_BZHfrrgvXAtL8tmJoaD68-7MXn2wxC2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Otro día más, y como siempre, retrasos, retrasos, retrasos y más retrasos y lo peor de todo información cero. No paro de decirlo Renfe es lo peor de lo peor y no solo porque fallan muchísimo sino porque no informan de nada, te tienes que buscar la vida literalmente para saber a qué vía tienes que ir en caso de que ocurra algún problema. Y los luminosos con información nula! Gracias Renfe y ADIF por no dejarme disfrutar de mi tiempo y de mi familia. Lamentablemente un fiel reflejo de la España actual, que pena!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClm7eh0QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x20e923e412ce76cc"],"When":"2023-11-27"},{"Name":"Ismael Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8R2N3GZIBseX4Q-xx-HwDt8mo4pzqBz23ZTEtCe8yWXMxm3U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Al entrar he pasado mi billete y las puertas se han abierto. La limpieza y el orden son relativamente buenas, teniendo en cuenta que es una estación bastante concurrida diariamente. El trato con el personal de taquilla es bueno y te solucionan cualquier duda que tengas. El punto negativo es que, debido a lo grande que es, puede ser muy confuso a la hora de buscar los andenes, ya que en ocasiones ni las señalización ayuda. En resumen, una estación por la que seguramente pasarás si vives en Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""}]

La estación está un poco retirada de la humanidad y si vas de noche a pie solo da un poco de mal rollo. El parking deberían reformarlo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkgdiSbQ&fid=0x0:0x295eda9114bf67cb"],"When":"2018-5-2"},{"Name":"Rosario Galán García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsIUXd77oFoA3oognvkD4b-cDyThF8xKd4N-EDdA9wz87529L-iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"2023 otoño incorporación bicicletas Bicimad.
Mala señalización. Se accede por una carretera que al acceder tiene un solo cartel que indica "Renfe Mantenimiento".
No está planteada para acceder al barrio de las Tablas aún estando limítrofe. Y robos como en todas las estaciones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR0oy9PA&fid=0x0:0x295eda9114bf67cb"],"When":"2023-4-21"},{"Name":"David Gutiérrez Sacristán SPAIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN_8lqZwvWDE74pWGuKtN8T-Z0Z0XB0ObVFxmYncca5qwLmULnPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Parada de tren de cercanías muy cómoda ya que tiene un gran parking. Ideal para ir al centro en menos de 20 minutos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc68T-BA&fid=0x0:0x295eda9114bf67cb"],"When":"2020-4-11"},{"Name":"Miguel de Dios Matias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0THWvZFnzer7q_dityY7iwEoLftHS8CvRjtPaRPk65hDkXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La he usado desde hace años porque curraba por desgracia en las Tablas (que sitio mas inhóspito y vacío).

A esta estación le falta vida, debería haber taquilla como la embajadores todo el día y la noche. Porque en invierno y de noche es una sensación mas desolada allí, te puede venir un asesino o una depresión en cero segundos.

No hay taquillas, y la cafetería esta abandonada desde hace años.

Y quizá aunque sea mucha obra y dinero (y sobres que se llevaran empresas corruptas y políticos corruptos), debería tener salida directa por el este, al barrio de Las Tablas, en vez de andar por el camino de bicis hasta el largo túnel ese que atraviesa las vías.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfredo Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlcFgOKsyvx8PcYjZ0OMjEdMFktW8px_wB1r5lffdMWBN98G3e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Los accesos con el coche son muy malos, llenos de baches, malas indicaciones, el estado general de las aceras y asfalto es penoso, deberian de reasfaltar y hacer reformas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEk_W4eg&fid=0x0:0x295eda9114bf67cb"],"When":"2018-5-13"},{"Name":"LTMusics LTLife","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXBqJfcIDV4PeXWAJeuNmjuR5WOT8XUKi1yppc-j6YVWwOMzs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Estación de paso con múltiples problemas en los tornos de acceso a diario, en caso de lluvia no hay espacio para resguardarse, aunque hay una pequeña parte techada no es suficiente para resguardar a la gran cantidad de pasajeros que esperan en hora punta.
No dispone de Servicios","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vicky Mscq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVPod92UQrR3LZ_ZCrEyqd1wu0qhX5NfqXhgGvkVp0eCUfzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Valla cambio ha pegado dicha estación!! Trabajé más d un año en la gasolinera q está al principio de la calle y d esto hace casi 20 años!!! Ahí sí q daba miedo,xq nunca había nadie los findes y cuando salía de trabajar en pleno invierno a las 22h, se tenía q cruzar x las vías y olvídate d buses.. sólo autocares para la gente que iba a Tele5 y oficinas cercanas!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Big thanks to the locals living in Madrid that helped us and provided info to us. We managed to get a taxi and made the connection in time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is the western gateway to Madrid and a complex place with a shopping mall complex. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Harry Turver-Kingston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbgP-5Jw5CG1MT-KnawxDwLG5afPlKHFVTbofs2hI_pT508P04gw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very efficient station but beware of pickpockets","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEth18NvDF8LPrptF3cchS\u0026fid=0x0:0x381dea838f5bb8e8"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Urban Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZY0HoHOb7lzycQDWjKey0rY0ABGKAZdibLczqX3_UWre4TRE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Railway station is more modern than the Metro one. Please be aware of many pickpockets swarming the area","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc7er7dw\u0026fid=0x0:0x381dea838f5bb8e8"],"When":"2020-3-20"},{"Name":"Logan Petrus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIAVqJejUQmzduuHEI8m6FCNIb2J3BJ04SrdvgKWqe49xBNwg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible service. Wasted my money after speaking with two employees using Spanish. Also almost made me miss the Real Madrid game. Don’t recommend. Call an uber !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PSS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfKutBd-TvoCtifg4WUegN3MLRbf782QrLeMIn9mRYGdhESg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Renfe, Madrid, Sol. But from our exposure to Renfe as tourists, across a fairly large slice of the country, you could probably read this as \"Renfe Spain\". Brilliant \"train set\" and service frequency. Love the Airport Cercanias service, clean, frequent \"step free\" service to/from the major Madrid train terminals. Fabulous and frequent high speed line Madrid-Barcelona (and beyond both ends). Relaxing rural services (we did Zaragoza-Bilbao-Madrid). All let down by (generally) visibly bored, indifferent (to rude) staff (think public transport staff in most countries). Confusing ticket machines, supposedly multilingual but which invariably require  a staff \"assistant\" hovering in the foreground, continually pushing the correct buttons for baffled tourists (we purchased return tickets to the airport four days before they were required, to avoid any \"on the day\" confusion ... only to find \"on the day\" they expired two hours after purchase. Bored shrug from Renfe \"assistant\"). Not the end of the world but it would be so, SO easy to have a multilingual warning \"This ticket expires in two hours\". And then there's the Renfe Cercanias city routes leaflet ... in Spanish only ... aw c'mon Renfe, it's the non Spanish tourists that need help with where/how the trains go, not the locals. But then this is Spain, with it's largely \"need the tourist dollars but f77k the tourists\" attitude. Perhaps that's what makes the place so irresistible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Kan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIJIgFCqd28K1gLGWsHJJgSHxP66ENZ-ab4QaJ5GsBojlJcmY3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Train station at the center of Madrid at Puerta del Sol. There are commuter trains and Metro lines 1, 2, and 3. This station is very busy and touristy. It is good for the shopping district.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Naia Capanema","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAoLAOhpRJRARK1SOtYoA-4t4S2nW9dpVsf9hs-ZuRLMHnDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This estacion links with all other stations. Quite a big one.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JAY :D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXazfwzQK6VY-uK5hGbG_sSIQBRUWM0_gVnD3Y_ltuqBmAXbUU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Currently under construction 6/8/22","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOxsO5Ww\u0026fid=0x0:0x381dea838f5bb8e8"],"When":"2022-6-8"},{"Name":"Dennis Lentino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMBZymkfWWXkI82CM6RGnrQOKruxQZcTlUY50pS6cPkNtc7Rs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Madrid is amazing and very clean","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Metro Nuevos Ministerios
address: C/ de Agustín de Betancourt, 25, Chamberí, 28003 Madrid
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Fobby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzGcHq55PwqCR6ckTH2kG2vKn5hRjLM6KtoryYYNwMVC6kOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The metro system in Madrid is fantastic. For a tourist get a Tourist Ticket from a dedicated machine in the station. (We got ours at the Airport station). Just select the number of days and away you go. The Tourist Tickets can also be used on other forms of transport. The price is a bargain compared to train prices in the UK.   The metro is really easy to navigate and there are quick routes to the city centre and also the airport. Really clean and felt open, bright and airy, so much nicer and cleaner than the underground in London.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLnf2L4QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x836eba1712f21d84"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Gustavo Téllez Robleto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIFZqQiUm2vVJ3f-X5Xca90-x5tYvrQW5KJx3u8P72HQ39BvfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ampliación) for the expansion of the metro has led to the construction of line 8 to provide direct service from the city centre to Barajas International Airport (including baggage check-in at Nuevos Ministerios, its downtown terminus); the construction of line 11; the extension of lines 1, 4, 7, 9, and 10; and, biggest of all, the 41-kilometre circular Metrosur line (12) serving Madrid's southern suburbs. title: Renfe Atocha
open_hours: {"Friday":["7:30 am–12 am"],"Monday":["7:30 am–12 am"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["7:30 am–12 am"],"Tuesday":["7:30 am–12 am"],"Wednesday":["7:30 am–12 am"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mithun Hossain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7V4KnNZfzfcgOKD51Zd_ADcURXP__CxBMwjKyUNIwzwDiL_fr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Trying to just help people outside of Spain who want to visit this incredibly beautiful city. A lot of info on the trains below.

Atocha is Madrid's biggest train station that has lines going through out to the entire country.  In span of 5 days I took 5 out ound and inbound trains to the station.

The bottom levels of the station houses the Atocha stop on Line 1 (which I used) and a few other lines of the Madrid Metro

Have not seen much of the station and connections so want to try to help all future travelers. Me and my wife came here blind with some info..amassed on YouTube blogger sites etc

Like is said you should use the station due to its connection with Madrid Metro and also Renfe's other ancillary lines that take you to other places in the city.  Every Renfe High Speed tickets  comes with Renfe Cercanias Tickets..the the Renfe Carcainias connects with outer parts of the city and surroundings.

For instance, my hotel was located in Herrera Oriya and by Madrid Metro it would take me 50 minutes with 2 line changes because this hotel is located a little outside of the city which was the Eurostar Suites Mara Sierra (10/10 hotel..will post review on that later).

Renfe Carcainias has a stop there and takes me there from Atocha in 26 min..vs 52 mins I. Metro ..The Cercanias Tickets work 4 hours before your high speed train journey begins and 4 hours after it ends.

The station is huge and features a nice layout. However the primary reason I wanted to write this review is because its a hot chaotic mess there...and I want to do whatever I can to help outsiders.

Now if you know Spanish fluently, you're good, if you don't give yourself 45 minutes before your departure. I never expect people to be able to speak in English in other countries so this is not a complaint. Just telling you guys to give that extra time because these stations are huge and a lot is going on

I had 5 trips in 5 days here from Madrid to other cities .While other cities like Cordoba, Grenada, Valencia are fine...Madrid and Barcelona needs a lot of time and attention..
I figured out the train station after the second time.

RENFE HIGHSPEED vs IRYO HIGHSPEED

Out of the 10 trips back and forth to other cities I used Renfe Ave 7 times and IRYO 4 times..I was excited to be traveling on Renfe Ave. Renfe is run by the Spanish govt and IRYO is private.  Out of the 10 trips both Renfe and IRYO were always on time...But in general I found IRYO to feature a lot newer and more comfortable coaches with both USB-A outlets as well as two blugs European style that you can plug your charger on. Renfe only features the plug points, so no USB.  I am talking about the regular class and not about business or first

I hate making comparisons but when I went to Italy in 2018, their trains were far more advanced and clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBPcVjCYyHOD0k3Gk35LTTo&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Graham Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFWUSN3rdVk9gZdw5-YIymvFoc6esLQGmgyCbx7RJSUUk4rQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The train station is large and busy. We managed to get return tickets for the following day to visit Toledo. All went on time and fast, just 35 minutes. As a Brit with a reasonable understanding of the Spanish language information was easy accessible and most officials and ticket office personnel spoke reasonable English","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpmU1MQD2NhsNjvlSdSLdF&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2025-6-20"},{"Name":"Erdogan Yanikoglu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmEGzHBY1WDFlewmM0Qt23Yus99kY8t7MCq3sFDT-BXrpzPvQUVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It sucks in every aspects. App doesn't work, browser doesn't work, one has to wait more than half an hour to buy a ticket from Madrid to toledo half an hour ticket!!!!!! Renfe is regret.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHYQeKOLnXiQo4uD3gnszj&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Jorge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv7PgMBDY_mfm4AaZhddV8yBpJpcse9jBoyVHqcY0u2klRq09H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Preciosa estación con accesos a Cercanías y líneas de alta velocidad
Beautiful train station with access to Cercanías (Regional Madrid Trains) and high speed trains.
In the pictures the acces to platforms (1 to 8) and ticket control
You can get your ticket easily in the automatic machines.Easy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOqWiN6-6MiM9gE&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"H S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuu2SxYH73fU3bVPRmsnKVYDTIR_w95-NunhqLfxRSLtJfxxZZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just want to give a shout out to the lady who helped me in the Renfe office here in Atocha. I foolishly mistook the Cercanías platform for ours and missed the train, and she was very kind and helpful in changing our tickets. It could have been a disastrous start to our trip if not for her supportive attitude. Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mamdukh Khamuie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbABgIyrO1sr9YOyoChqg1oAnDXfbXDzo_Jd5RCDtPWUYyMLk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent service and easy schedule every one hour has a travel from Madrid to the south Malaga, very reasonable ticket price if you buy it in advance","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZrtGlPw&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2023-10-1"},{"Name":"Youcef M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUp7BvcksH0cmZAXIMdcgDkArLSAdO45401NzMDxwC6USbeyGrY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ticket prices vary throughout the day. Night fares are cheaper than the daytime fares.
I travelled with Renfe from Madrid to Cordoba and the train was on time. The journey goes by quickly, with the train travelling at a speed of 270 kilometers an hour. We arrived on time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbp9OayQE&fid=0x0:0x1182877fcb993431"],"When":"2024-8-10"},{"Name":"Rosa Ui Bhriain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtzPncI9Bz220p1LY5LTcGfXQahDqYjN9QSzaDMPuIX5fy9hBC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"One of the most frustrating experiences I’ve had at a train station. I had to queue in three different places just to get basic information. No clear signage, no help, just confusion.

Worse still, the staff were on their phones while people waited, even with numbered tickets being called. Completely unprofessional and disorganized for a major station in a capital city.

Atocha and Renfe need serious improvements — this is unacceptable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Gran Vía
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Danny Hyun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV86NJe45qWZLThvqWIYAfdrSDrOEzKiAb0XVWAwWocVz3utftx8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While most other Spanish cities are historically significant, Madrid, at just over 500 years old, is considered relatively young. Despite this, it's a beautiful city with a modern yet quaint feel.
Gran Vía is a famous street in Madrid, Spain.

It's where the Spanish royal family, and the wealth and power of Spain, gather, giving the street a clean and luxurious feel.
It's famous for its beautiful, old-world architecture, as well as its numerous shops, theaters, and performance halls. The theaters that line the street often host musicals, plays, and other performances, earning it the nickname "Spain's Broadway."
It's brimming with energy and offers a wealth of entertainment.
The city center is home to luxury hotels, boutiques, galleries, and numerous global brands, making it a popular shopping street for locals.

Anyone also find street vendors selling a variety of counterfeit goods.
It's a delight to see them haggling with customers, their large bags filled with counterfeit goods spread out in front of them.

Anyone can enjoy a stroll along Gran Vía. With a variety of restaurants, cafes, and bars lining the street, you'll find plenty to enjoy.
This boulevard connects the Royal Palace of Madrid or Plaza Mayor to El Retiro Park, and we recommend taking a stroll along it. We highly recommend experiencing the quaint yet modern Gran Vía.

For your information, "Gran Vía" translates to "Grand Street."","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very famous street in Madrid. It's got some good architecture, street vendors, shops, restaurants, and entertainment. Lots to do there. A lot of it (as of February, 2024) is under renovation, but the vibe is still there and there's a lot to do. Some people call it the Broadway of Madrid, I can see why. Be aware that because this is a tourist area, a lot of things will be slightly more expensive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdltvAag&fid=0x0:0x32afa6604bc0f548"],"When":"2024-2-15"},{"Name":"Maczu FD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW79U1tXr4yEGz6Xixg8jgcCae-RdVCqClE9gC7UoCBRBakuCib0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Its nicer than i thought. Everything is close in this street so you can walk to several locations from here, have a good meal, drink and shop","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL25j5kgE&fid=0x0:0x32afa6604bc0f548"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Yogendra Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiiiub5UJUiH_EXcRTgySty0PpVP218D69JBOONLcbxpo7qWnTNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gran Vía is a famous street in Madrid, Spain. It is known for its vibrant atmosphere, impressive architecture, and numerous shops, theaters, and entertainment venues. Gran Vía is often referred to as the "Spanish Broadway" due to the many theaters that line the street, showcasing musicals, plays, and other performances. The street is a hub of activity, with bustling crowds, shops selling fashion and electronics, and a variety of restaurants, cafes, and bars. Some of the iconic landmarks along Gran Vía include the Metropolis Building, Telefonica Building, and the Edificio Grassy. Gran Vía is also a popular shopping destination, with a wide range of stores catering to different tastes and budgets. title: Chamartín
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Luis Jose B.G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuBwZ4gOqfLA2bhbJ8M-BlaZFuKoOstTEOY163CXj7JGaWJEq0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hace más de treinta años que no pasaba por la estación de Chamartín. Han puesto muchísima tiendas y restaurantes que le da muchísima vida. También recuerdo el panel de letras movibles que anunciaba la salida y entrada de los trenes y el ruido característico que hacía","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4nLqxtgE\u0026fid=0x0:0xe3b3f7164eb07bda"],"When":"2018-3-1"},{"Name":"Martu Yarumeko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2dCppbgB24cYEUwR_VCUWOfx5IoNK4a4vlZQx7VSAk9FvsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"es un lio enorme y una estación que lleva en obras muchos meses, cuando te ves la vía y vas a ella se hacen tapones y colas de gente gigantes porque solo hay una persona verificando billetes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj1zy0EwjkmKSnD8G4CtYvsZ4VrVyOSAHd0_8dv4KSZoHMGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"no me ha gustado nada la estación de Chamartín ya que no había carritos para llevar las maletas y he perdido el tren.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cinthia Ezcurra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd1GGhbu-89O6PZIMId_TTXrtod_nC79H8Gr76JEtima-uEcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La estación es amplia y con muchas tiendas por si tienes que hacer alguna compra de última hora o tienes tiempo para pasear. Salen trenes de alta velocidad; el ave, trenes normales, cercanías y también tienen estación de metro.\nEs una estación moderna, muy amplia, limpia, de fácil acceso con personal muy amable que resuelve todas las dudas.\nPara hacer la espera más agradable tienes un pequeño centro comercial con tiendas, bares y restaurantes, una buena zona de ocio.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaime López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6279U_zkvaASFaOK43GUeIR4HJbspSoNXkSo2pohzqkSn0UI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cada vez que paso por esta estación es un infierno, mas de media hora diariamente esperando a que el tren siga su trayecto, parados.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Albert Valle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwieCuI3zPXbNLzluZXs2yiYkvWBD1fhBDu97U7wieLKiB8iXdyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estación difícil de entender al principio y es raro porque en los cercanías las estaciones las cambian de nombre, no tiene sentido","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4lruBtQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xe3b3f7164eb07bda"],"When":"2018-2-13"},{"Name":"Jesus Gonzalez Juanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIs0JtCNZHdmW1aTdwwcrOH5PhtBmG1WLgbSWxNp2QLoPZHWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Servicio de taxi para ir a otra estación, demasiado caro 25€ ... user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Luis Angel Herrero Alonso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAPwaDO2OVLc64fwfGWbYWbq-02kR6YAqtqiDSelY6mmwQ1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ok","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"itin ito ito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDh3njRKKkpqC8j96NRNkih3_0yXLxFAWyfLz3LZVKEN22Vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Se trataba de unos pequeños tractores diésel de maniobras de la serie 10100 (luego 301) surgidos de la colaboración entre La Maquinista Terrestre y Marítima (MTM) y la Empresa Nacional de Autocamiones (ENASA). Fueron fabricados entre 1959 y 1963 por la propia MTM, Euskalduna, y MACOSA con motores ENASA-Pegaso (de las iniciales de cada empresa surgió la denominación de "MeMe" por la que fueron ampliamente conocidos, al igual que por "pegasines"), para movimientos de material en grandes estaciones y depósitos de RENFE","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"benjamin rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvbvx1KJ--010uwskbN-hqaXAXJrPpsMpR_qCIMM0LsEtuhA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Renfe es basura, precios altisimos y muchos fallos cada vez mas, se quedaron anclados en el pasado cuando el ave era algo novedoso grandioso y valia como un avion... A dia de hoy decenas de años despues sigen con los precios infladisimos y con los mismos trenes de antaño que dan muchos fallos, y porsupuesto su servicio es pesimo no puedes ni comer algo medio que sinque ademas te metan un sablazo increible... Aleluya porla liberacion de loa trenes de alta velocidad y alabado sean Iryo y ouigo... Ahora faltan que lleguen a cercanias y a la quiebra renfe! Espero ese dia con entusiasmo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jose lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLDbZGhSEhYubTBhYV3DtRlZ5Sc4t-35m7wTLtMk4aYGvb39g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He comprado un billete de ave a Leon, clase confort. Lo primero que me encuentro es con una silla rígida como un palo e incomoda como una piedra.
Ole por el confort AVE:
te destrozo el trasero y la espalda.
Menudo timo. Para que quede claro es la última fila del vagón, no las de las mesitas, que tienen unos 10 centímetros de movilidad, pero que son de igual incomodidad.
Si quieres una mala silla (no es sillón) viaja en AVE de Renfe. Ademas no sabrás ni cuando sale ni cuando llega.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzFcwGRxqHSsdit-ckCxMG&fid=0x0:0x5a877ff95c4ab231"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Javier Soriano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-G4zZseAKSO_Thy8oW3zMbVCb9LVHbFBsE2vFAm-lTRMKQ3eIQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La linea de alta velocidad Madrid - Sevilla lleva ya unos meses que es un auténtico desastre. Bien por falta de mnteniento de los trenes, que es responsabilidad de Renfe o bien por falta de mantenimiento de la infraestructura que es responsabilidad de ADIF. El caso es que de mis últimos 3 viajes, en los tres he tenido retrasos entre 30 minutos y 5 horas....","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"alejandra capote agudo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoY1GrbzwkGFGzmiSWpg_skDaZvAT_7_wLrO2tcvKGEBBIiP4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No he visto peor servivio que renfe, nefasto
Los cercanias siempre edtropeados con incidrncias yodos los doas retrasos
Y el ave que decir,penoso
De verguenza que en pleno siglo xxi haya estas invidencias,simo se quema un tren se quema la catenaria si no,es robo de cables
Fatal pero fatal","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicolás Blanco Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVldmjKpuw0u9XzRieejrahdD1S5kERvC_oDZjYMKKfcZuLTRn4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"De todos los sitios de mi vida que he visitado este es el único que he llegado tarde habiendo cogido un ticket para llegar una hora antes, pero lo peor es que cuando desembarque del tren ave o tren paloma tuerta, pues no estaba en la terminal que debería y debía coger el Renfe cercanías, pero lo que no sabía era que esa decisión sería la peor que tomaria en toda mi vida. Para empezar tuve que sacar una pulsera como si se tratase de una del gimnasio, pero para ir en un tren, después tuve que recorrerme toda la estación que es más grande que un aeropuerto, porfin conseguí llegar al tren que me llevaría a mi destino, pero me equivoque, a mitad del trayecto a todos los que Ivan a mi destino (el prostíbulo de las chicas empapadas) teníamos que bajarnos en la estación siguiente y continuar el viaje en camello, pero el caso es que al final conseguí alcanzar el prostíbulo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Calderón Polanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT13HEdQcbQ-kF2HeqpSm8BDrxMisMm1KhWT_wrnwlym9pFv8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La página web es absolutamente desastrosa: desde hace más de 6 meses no he podido comprar ni billetes ni abonos por internet: cuando vas a confirmar, sale un logo de captcha, pero no aparece éste por ningún sitio y se bloquea la página y la compra .
Hay que hacer la compra por teléfono, con el consiguiente gasto de tiempo que que, rara vez comunicas con la operadora sin esperar un montón de tiempo","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Fuencarral
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gustavo Téllez Robleto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIFZqQiUm2vVJ3f-X5Xca90-x5tYvrQW5KJx3u8P72HQ39BvfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Impotant mean of transportation","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joel Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFAWJAI9LiuQVFJVlYHP4GBitLKy78CUB3qlh-gCymyAb8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hoy 13/05/2025.  Voy pasando y una chica m pide la targeta,y les digo que porque no se lo pide a los demás a lo que ella me contesta: yo se lo pido aquien yo quiera y quien m parezca. Y les dije eso es racismo y ahí empezamos a discutir.. hasta mi madre que descanse en paz me la mencionó. Una falta de respeto. Yo paso todo los días por ahí y si vuelve hacer lo mismo te voy a denunciar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blanca Gómez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6GfXf_ac0JupMAmn6bFMZjUq2jm8_K9cpb8UrlyOVvmTTWTle=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La estacion5es espaciosa y nueva, no tiene ascensor. El ambiente a la salida del metro no es muy recomendable, a menudo hay gente bebiendo a la salida que al tener un bar al lado, es punto de reunión de gente habituada a beber en la calle, y no precisamente jóvenes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonio Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrwOHHtGnc609Pap9PHZ_aoVXEcuaLuX8JCImHoBj8mrZ4QOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Solo una línea de metro, reformada hace relativamente poco tiempo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJiqelTg&fid=0x0:0x398cce5487796cfb"],"When":"2023-6-24"},{"Name":"Willy Nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4MzuCqNFxyglTKkb-cYwUlfQ7f7hOsKx7SFYGkfJZ5ua9d80o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El metro Fuencarral es el único para un barrio muy extenso, funciona bien, tiene trenes cada 3-4 minutos. Lo utilizo para visitar a mi hija,  La espera es aceptable en todo caso. Trasladarse del centro a Fuencarral no demora más de 35-40 minutos, incluso llegas más rápido que en coche. Muy bien, lo recomiendo.

En cambio la RENFE de Fuencarral está a una distancia considerable, pero no sé puede decir que Fuencarral está mal comunicada.  Hay autobuses, la M30 y más.

Lo que no es de recibo a estas alturas de la vida que sigan habiendo metros en una ciudad como Madrid, sin acceso para ancianos, discapacitados. Hace falta un ASCENSOR, en esa zona hay muchos ancianos y madres con niños en su coche, o gente con el carrito de compra que tiene que acceder por una escalera extensa.

Repito: su servicio es bueno, rápido, recomendable. El ambiente tranquilo, es cierto que hay un bar cerca del metro pero no molestan.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jorge Gullon Ramírez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLvVS5FLpR-nIEs9SRWPX_TiMnJAcgFgdZNNYuDJ2lZjoMrCOq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Boca de metro muy interesante puesto que pertenece a la línea 10 que atraviesa Madrid de norte a sur. Línea muy rápida los trenes pasan cada 2 minutos en hora punta y cada cuatro o cinco en hora valle Si coges el metro aquí puedes ir sentado todo el camino van bastante vacíos los convoyes. El único problema es que no tiene acceso para inválidos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"santiago malaguera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_Tb4E8vlXTE_7PETty4IaJB0thkYYHtHjtRDOcpNQtqhr6p9xkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"cada que pasa el tren se levanta una nube de polvo de los andén, porfa le limpiar es horrible","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Ferreira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaDLz8BJRDc9WJuFSfUhqvlvHaRpQbrQvzvCcvHQRqSE5LO8Ao3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No hay acessibilidade, muchas escaleras y, al salir del metro, hay que passar por entre las mesas del bar y enfrentar las miradas. Mejoren las indicaciones , por favor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"EmiTogo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9HWMGjCt3LkH2rrkYOxol-odTKigAyT8STlUu_fgVgxlEXaHu6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cuidado con el servicio de megafonía, no se entiende nada  debido  a que entra en reverberacion. Enorme estacion de metro y cercanías. Muy bien situada en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk3dGKtAE&fid=0x0:0x5305b2c492274efd"],"When":"2019-3-1"},{"Name":"Jaime A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7hfHsb3vR1rveYCNA2sk9vwPe5U4M9mA0pLJVKSayVdEb2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Como siempre quien tenga cierta experiencia, estará acostumbrado a la mala señalización habitual en las estaciones de Cercanía, pero el día que alguien tenga que usar un ascensor, cuidado. Ni una sola señal indicando dónde están los ascensores y cuando se da con ellos y se entra, se limita a indicar "acceso a vías". Mi experiencia: para ir a la vía 6, hay que adivinar que hay que bajar a la vía 4, cruzar casi todo el andén para pasar a una entreplanta donde hay más ascensores (todo esto sin señalizar en absoluto, claro). Ahí encuentras más ascensores que indican que en esa entreplanta (-2) está el acceso a la vía 6, pero no, no hay vías, hay que darle al botón que indica en el ascensor vía 8 (-3) y apareces en la 6 que no tiene acceso a la 8. Es decir, no sólo hay falta de señales por la estación, sino que está mal señalizado. Si vas con un carro con un niño o similar y tienes la suerte de coincidir en la parada con el acceso de mínusválidos, te encontrarás confinado en un área reducida con dos escalones a ambos lados y un baño averiado que emana todo tipo de pestilencias, para salir de ahí, el escalón que te ahorraste al entrar, lo tienes una vez dentro. Señores de Renfe son unos sinvergüenzas (por no decir otra cosa).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chareme maluto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVYNxU9ODf73CRe3pMlaK6MjyWPt0h2JWQhhF64cI0YkMdmLGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No es tan mal pero he encontrado una trabajadora del metro dentro de la sección del billete que no quiere ayudar y ni sabe escuchar porque ni todavía no he explicado o preguntado pero ya me mandan a la información😅 aunque sea te dicen hola buenas dias a la información usted pero no. Aunque sea un poco de cordialidad. Espero que cuando vuelvo encontrare uno que sea con educación.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Li Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt0c_JBZ7qYRnJT6NKLtFd13FyxZ2ATeORUTiCdagrXiG2VHboYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Terrible train station compared to other big city train stations.

Once passing through the luggage scanning there's not enough seats for passengers who are waiting for board. Very few and overpriced food and drink places.

Another problem, thought not specifically about this station, is that there's no one stop vending machine for train tickets. Different companies offer their own machine and customer service points.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbJWA5NIK6-qYuxaYhtryk&fid=0x0:0xd2eeb9d69003a049"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Gareth Hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkHblfFPtpcc5H9wWhJdjWsYEKLTIv9usmoHs_7wUl2csJoas=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Whole train station is currently a giant building site, with the entire palm tree section obscured by a building site sheet.
No places to sit other than the platforms which have an extremely limited number of seats compared to the numbers attending the train.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Golliher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9rCWmeTb1b1e7Lx0XdZeodjbEfiLlScOGFkgCgYGGWVDlFblXGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The station is attractive and easily maneuvered.

It was my first time at this station.  From walking in to arriving at my platform took about 15 minutes.

Note you should buy your ticket ahead of time.

You do need to pass through security where they scan your bags, but can have liquids and you don't remove shoes or electronics.

The place runs like clockwork.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXtrDDCg&fid=0x0:0xd2eeb9d69003a049"],"When":"2024-10-16"},{"Name":"Khandakar Morshed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_M4Q8hyQ4HPh5O4tFzs3-aozhWI5ADNhLHGkzG6v-k6Hxs-R81Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Atocha Cercanías is a key commuter rail station in Madrid, well-organized and conveniently located near many of the city's main attractions. The station is clean and generally well-maintained, with clear signage that makes navigating between platforms easy. There are plenty of amenities, including shops, cafes, and restrooms, which make waiting for a train more comfortable. The trains run frequently and are a great way to get around Madrid and its suburbs. However, it can get very crowded during peak hours, so plan accordingly. Overall, a reliable and efficient station for commuters and tourists alike.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH8IjKbQ&fid=0x0:0xd2eeb9d69003a049"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Arturo Crespo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmHfaGj8BymKWbYNB3NId_rs1cYIf4uipIj_cU2YtrqNg0xdn9MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"An ugly station. Very old and small for the number of passengers. Not enough seats in the waiting area (seriously only like 50 seats). The indoor garden is nice but you can enter and the poor plants are covered with dust. This station urgently needs a renovation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfhYDQdA&fid=0x0:0xd2eeb9d69003a049"],"When":"2025-1-8"},{"Name":"Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWekpg388E1hgEJTfvON4uizEB90FuFnC9IjIuXosoR7329PUB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My girlfriend slipped and fell on the moving escalator like walkway after we entered the station. Creo que se llama Óscar.
